description: Queen Kaya's Catch Cup team featured on the channel: Talonflame lead running double flying charge moves (Brave Bird + Fly instead of Flame Charge), Spiritomb safe swap, Gourgeist closer using Seed Bomb. Creator endorses the Talonflame + Gourgeist combo and says the team is also valid in open Great League.
performanceNotes: Climbed to Legend with this lineup
Weak to Lickilicky and Hydreigon core breakers
Struggles into Centiskorch without Quagsire backup

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: LEGEND TEAM Great League | Pokemon GO PvP
